allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const stat = fs.statSync\('public/data/stars.bin'\); console.log\('stars.bin size:', stat.size, 'bytes'\); console.log\('expected ~4812 stars:', Math.floor\(stat.size/48\), 'stars'\);")
